title: Tıbbi Dokümantasyon ve Sekreterlik Programı - Ders İçeriği

(2-0-2/2)

2075G1003 YABANCI DİL I

(2-0-2/ 3 )

Dersin içeriği ise Determiners - This, that, these, those Verb to be ( am / is / are ), Simple Present Tense – Have, has, Simple Present Tense – routine actions– permanent states– repeated actions and habits, adverbs of frequency– question forms such as Do you….. / How often do you …? konularından oluşmaktadır.

(2-0-2/2)

2075B1003 YABANCI DİL II

(2-0-2/ 3)

Bu dersin içeriğini, Adjectives; Comparative adjectives, Superlative adjectives, Verb patterns love, enjoy, hate…Past Continuous Tense – when, while–for something which continued before and after another action–for something that happened before and after a particular time, Past Simple vs Past Continuous, Been (when someone has gone to a place and returned) or Gone (when someone has not returned) Present Perfect vs Past Simple ve If clause Type  Zero : when talking about our

habits

, our

typical behaviors

,

explanations, guidelines, advices, orders

and

instructions, general truths, Real World

and
